Bash(node -e "const {createClient}=require\('@libsql/client'\); const c=createClient\({url:'file:./prisma/dev.db'}\); c.execute\('select 1 as x'\).then\(r=>{console.log\('libsql OK', JSON.stringify\(r.rows\)\)}\).catch\(e=>console.log\('libsql FAIL', e.message\)\)")

Bash(node --experimental-sqlite -e "const {DatabaseSync}=require\('node:sqlite'\); const db=new DatabaseSync\('./prisma/dev.db'\); const r=db.prepare\('select count\(*\) c from Module'\).get\(\); console.log\('node:sqlite reads existing DB:', JSON.stringify\(r\)\); db.close\(\);")
